title: China-to-Lebanon Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
provenance: AI-compiled, multi-model cross-checked, not human-verified. Informational only; confirm with the official regulator and a qualified professional. Not legal/certification/customs/market-access advice.

rows.requirement: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 Evidence for Lebanon PV Inverters
rows.target_requirement: For Lebanon PV inverter imports and projects, EMC evidence should be prepared against IEC 62920 for photovoltaic power conversion equipment and the relevant IEC 61000-series tests, including harmonic-current and immunity / emissions evidence requested by the importer, LIBNOR conformity route, installer, insurer, or project owner. Lebanon commonly uses Lebanese standards (NL) that may adopt or reference IEC standards, so the exact LIBNOR scope should be confirmed for the product and import route. For grid-interactive installations, EMC evidence should be read together with 220/380 V, 50 Hz country settings and anti-islanding / utility-interface evidence.
target_standards: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility test methods and limits, including harmonic-current emissions where applicable
LIBNOR Lebanese standards (NL) adoption / conformity route to be confirmed for the product
rows.china_equivalent: Chinese PV inverter EMC is commonly assessed under GB/T 37408 and related China test programmes. While those tests may draw on IEC 61000-series methods, China GB/T evidence alone does not establish Lebanon LIBNOR conformity, IEC 62920 coverage, or project-owner acceptance. Exporters should map any Chinese EMC report clause-by-clause against IEC 62920 and the requested IEC 61000 tests.
china_standards: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes EMC-related requirements
rows.gap: Gap: Chinese GB/T EMC reports are useful only if they can be mapped to the IEC evidence requested in Lebanon. Prepare model-specific IEC 62920 EMC reports and applicable IEC 61000 test results from an accredited laboratory, plus installation notes for hybrid inverter / battery configurations because conducted and radiated emissions, harmonics, and immunity may vary by configuration and operating mode.

mandatory_status.target: Product- and route-specific: required where LIBNOR conformity, importer due diligence, insurer, project owner, or EDL / LCEC grid-interactive review requests EMC evidence
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary / certification-programme evidence under China GB/T routes; not automatically accepted as Lebanon IEC / LIBNOR evidence

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not treat a China GB/T 37408 EMC certificate as automatic Lebanon acceptance. For Lebanon imports or projects, keep IEC 62920 and relevant IEC 61000 EMC evidence for the exact inverter model and configuration, then confirm the LIBNOR, importer, EDL / LCEC, insurer, or owner requirement that actually applies.

rows.requirement: EDL / LCEC Grid-Interactive Solar Context — Anti-Islanding, 220/380 V 50 Hz Settings, and Lebanon's Hybrid Reality
rows.target_requirement: Lebanon's public electricity system is operated by EDL, with LCEC acting as the national technical energy center for renewable-energy policy, programmes, and publications. Grid-interactive or net-metered PV inverter projects should be prepared around Lebanon's 220/380 V, 50 Hz supply context, EDL interconnection review, and LCEC net-metering / solar guidance where applicable. For inverter evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface test reports are the relevant IEC references for grid-interactive equipment. The practical context is unusual: because EDL supply has been highly constrained, many Lebanese rooftop solar projects are private off-grid or hybrid solar-plus-battery systems that may not proceed through a formal EDL net-metering approval. For those projects, grid-code approval may be less central than installer engineering, transfer-switch / backup configuration, battery-system safety, importer due diligence, and project-owner requirements.
target_standards: EDL grid / distribution interconnection requirements for projects connected to the public network
LCEC solar and net-metering guidance where a formal net-metered project is pursued
IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
Lebanon low-voltage supply context: 220/380 V, 50 Hz
rows.china_equivalent: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for photovoltaic power station connection, NB/T 32004 for photovoltaic grid-connected inverter technical specifications, GB/T 37408 for photovoltaic grid-connected inverter technical requirements, and domestic anti-islanding / grid-support tests. These China-side documents are based on Chinese grid conditions and approval practice. They do not automatically satisfy EDL / LCEC project review, LIBNOR conformity expectations, or private Lebanese project-owner requirements.
china_standards: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
rows.gap: Gap: China GB/T and NB/T grid evidence should be treated as baseline engineering evidence only. For grid-interactive Lebanon projects, prepare IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, country-parameter setting records for 220/380 V at 50 Hz, and project-specific EDL / LCEC documentation where net metering or public-grid connection is pursued. For the dominant off-grid / hybrid use case, document whether the inverter is operated in non-export, backup, or grid-interactive mode, and keep installer commissioning records, protection settings, battery compatibility, and importer declarations because formal EDL net-metering approval may not be the operative gate.

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific: mandatory where EDL public-grid connection or LCEC / EDL net-metering review applies; for private off-grid / hybrid systems, practical due diligence and contractual requirements may dominate over formal utility approval
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies Chinese grid operator or certification expectations only and is not transferable as Lebanon EDL / LCEC acceptance

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not assume a China grid certificate is sufficient for Lebanon. If the inverter will interact with the EDL grid or a net-metering arrangement, prepare IEC 62116 / IEC 61727 evidence and validate 220/380 V, 50 Hz settings. If the project is off-grid or hybrid because of constrained EDL supply, document the non-export / backup design, installer commissioning, battery interface, and importer due diligence instead of treating formal net metering as the only compliance gate.

rows.requirement: LCEC Solar / Net-Metering Route — Project Gate Separate from Import Conformity
rows.target_requirement: LCEC publishes Lebanon renewable-energy information and maintains solar-sector programmes, publications, and recommended-company information. Where a PV inverter is supplied for a formal net-metering or grid-interactive project, LCEC / EDL project requirements should be treated as a separate project gate from customs entry or LIBNOR conformity. Equipment evidence should connect the exact inverter model, firmware settings, anti-islanding mode, and installer responsibilities to the project submission. For private rooftop systems installed primarily to compensate for poor grid availability, the evidence package should still preserve IEC safety, grid-interaction, EMC, battery, and installation records even where no formal EDL net-metering file exists.
target_standards: LCEC solar and renewable-energy publications / programmes
EDL net-metering or public-grid interconnection rules where applicable
IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 as common evidence for grid-interactive PV inverters
Project owner, insurer, EPC, and installer requirements for private hybrid systems
rows.china_equivalent: China has domestic distributed-PV connection rules, grid-company review processes, and GB/T / NB/T inverter evidence. Those Chinese processes do not create eligibility for LCEC / EDL net-metering or Lebanese project acceptance. They may be useful as engineering background only if mapped to IEC reports and Lebanon-specific settings.
china_standards: NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
rows.gap: Gap: LCEC / EDL project evidence is not replaced by China distributed-PV approvals. Confirm the current route with the Lebanese installer, project owner, and, where applicable, LCEC / EDL before shipment. Keep a model-level evidence pack: IEC 62109 safety, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 grid-interface, IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC, country settings, labels, manuals, battery-compatibility notes, and commissioning records.

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory only where the project seeks LCEC / EDL net-metering or public-grid interconnection; otherwise often contractual, insurer, installer, or importer due diligence for private off-grid / hybrid installations
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese domestic distributed-PV approvals and GB/T / NB/T files are not transferable to Lebanon

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat LCEC / EDL net-metering or grid-interactive review as a Lebanon project gate, not an automatic consequence of China-side PV approval. For off-grid and hybrid rooftop systems, preserve the same IEC safety, grid-interaction, EMC, battery, and commissioning evidence because importer, installer, insurer, and owner due diligence may be the real approval path.

rows.requirement: LIBNOR / IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence for PV Inverters
rows.target_requirement: LIBNOR is Lebanon's national standards institution and Lebanese standards (NL) may adopt or reference IEC standards. For PV inverters, the core international safety evidence is IEC 62109-1 for general requirements and IEC 62109-2 for particular inverter requirements. Importers and installers should confirm whether the exact inverter, bundled AC/DC protection components, plugs, cables, or battery-related accessories fall within a regulated conformity route or specific Lebanese standard. In practice, IEC 62109-1/-2 test certificates for the exact model or model family are the safety baseline expected by sophisticated Lebanese importers, EPCs, insurers, and project owners, especially for hybrid rooftop systems with battery storage.
target_standards: LIBNOR Lebanese standards (NL) and conformity route for regulated products
IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
Applicable battery, DC isolator, surge-protection, wiring, and installation requirements for hybrid systems
rows.china_equivalent: China's PV inverter evidence commonly includes GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and voluntary Chinese certification or test reports. These files can support technical review, but they are China domestic baselines and are not automatically accepted as LIBNOR conformity or IEC 62109-1/-2 evidence. Some Chinese manufacturers also hold IEC CB or third-party IEC 62109 reports; those are more relevant to Lebanon due diligence than GB/T-only files, but the model scope, factory, critical components, and report validity still need checking.
china_standards: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
rows.gap: Gap: A China GB/T or NB/T report is not a substitute for IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence or a product-specific LIBNOR conformity determination. Prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 certificates and reports covering the exact inverter model or family, critical component lists, labels, installation manuals, AC/DC protection ratings, battery operating limits, and country-parameter configuration records. Confirm with the Lebanese importer whether any regulated-product conformity or documentary check applies at import.

mandatory_status.target: Product- and route-specific: LIBNOR conformity may be mandatory for regulated products or components; IEC 62109-1/-2 is the practical safety baseline for PV inverter due diligence and project acceptance
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 37408 and NB/T 32004 are China-side baseline / certification-programme evidence and are not automatically accepted as Lebanon LIBNOR or IEC safety evidence

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] For Lebanon, treat IEC 62109-1/-2 as the core PV inverter safety evidence and confirm the product-specific LIBNOR route with the importer. China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 files do not automatically prove Lebanon conformity. Hybrid solar-plus-battery systems need additional care around AC/DC protection, battery limits, backup transfer design, manuals, labels, and commissioning records.
